description_long: This object is a classic record player with a rectangular wooden base and a prominent circular turntable platter on top. The platter is black with a textured, dotted edge, and is centrally located, taking up a significant portion of the top surface. To the right of the platter is a tonearm assembly, which is metallic and features a pivoting mechanism, resting in its cradle. The front left corner of the wooden base has a single round black button, likely a power or start/stop control. The rear half of the device is covered by a translucent, frosted dust cover that is rectangular and slightly raised above the wooden base. The overall design combines retro aesthetics with modern materials, making it visually striking and functional.
description: A vintage-style record player with a wooden base, black platter, metallic tonearm, and a frosted dust cover. The design is both classic and modern, with distinct controls and a prominent turntable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden base, black platter, tonearm assembly, and a single control button on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden base, the full length of the dust cover, and the tonearm's resting position.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dust cover and the wooden base, with the platter and tonearm partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dust cover's hinge area and the platter's edge, with the tonearm extending outward.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and centrally located on the wooden base. It is black with a textured, dotted edge and appears to be made of plastic or metal with a rubberized mat. The platter is slightly raised and occupies about one-third of the top surface area. No visible grooves or labels are present, but the edge pattern is distinctive.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, metallic, and extends from the right side of the platter. It is straight with a pivoting base and a cradle for resting. The tonearm is medium-length, silver-gray in color, and has a smooth, matte finish. It is currently resting in its holder, not positioned over the platter.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is not clearly visible, but its location at the end of the tonearm is implied. It would be small, pointed, and likely made of metal and plastic, attached as a separate component.
attribute_control_knobs: A single round black button is visible on the front left corner of the wooden base. It is small, flush with the surface, and likely made of plastic. No other control knobs or switches are visible, and there are no discernible labels or markings.
attribute_dust_cover: The dust cover is present, made of translucent frosted plastic or glass, and covers the rear half of the record player. It is rectangular, slightly raised, and appears to be hinged at the back, allowing it to be opened or closed. The cover is removable and provides protection for the platter and tonearm.
